subject: A humanoid figure screams as a glowing blue ghost tears through them from behind, mouth open in a roar; the figure holds a device with green electrical energy trailing from it
description: A humanoid figure in casual layered clothing lunges forward with an open-mouthed scream. A luminous blue spectral form — a ghost with a wide-open screaming mouth — erupts from behind and through the figure's body, its energy radiating outward in streaks. The figure's hand clutches a mechanical device trailing green electrical arcs. The background is a dark paneled wall rendered in deep purples and blues, with streaks of blue light cutting across the scene. The overall impression is of possession or supernatural intrusion — the spirit bursting through an unwilling host.
foreground: human figure screaming, holding device with green electrical arcs
background: dark paneled wall, blue spectral light streaks
